note.en: Only useful when paired with **[[character:furina]]**, in which case it performs very close to **[[set:obsidian-codex]] (4)**.
note.fr: Utile seulement avec **[[character:furina]]**, auquel cas il est très proche de **[[set:obsidian-codex]] (4)**.
note.it: Utilizzabile solo in team con **[[character:furina]]**, ed in tal caso ha prestazioni molto simili a **[[set:obsidian-codex]] (4)**.
note.ru: Используется только при игре с **[[character:furina|Фуриной]]**, при этом близок к **[[set:obsidian-codex|Обсидиановому фолианту]] (4)**.
